No issues.\n\n**Report 2:**\n- **Findings:** Similar to Report 1, with emphasis on the complex bytecode being typical for compiled contracts. No malware or obfuscation.\n\n**Report 3:**\n- **Findings:** Again, a standard autogenerated factory with no malicious intent. No external data leaks or suspicious patterns.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, securityRisk=0, confidence=1.\n- **Assessment:** Benign, typical deployment code.\n\n**Report 4:**\n- **Findings:** Similar to previous reports, with no signs of malicious behavior.
